# LOMBOK NATURE CULTURE

LOMBOK NATURE CULTURE

## Produk

- [LNC-02: The Sasak Living Heritage (4D3N)](https://lomboknatureculture.com/produk/lnc-02-the-sasak-living-heritage-4d3n/) - Cultural immersion + Tetebatu highlands. Min. 2 pax.
- [LNC-03: Mandalika Legends (3D2N)](https://lomboknatureculture.com/produk/lnc-03-mandalika-legends-3d2n/) - Princess Mandalika legend + hidden southern beaches. Min. 2 pax.
- [LNC-04: Gili Meno Serenity (3D2N)](https://lomboknatureculture.com/produk/lnc-04-gili-meno-serenity-3d2n/) - Sea turtles + sunset horse riding + romantic dinner. Min. 2 pax.
- [LNC-05: Gili Trawangan Party & Chill (3D2N)](https://lomboknatureculture.com/produk/lnc-05-gili-trawangan-party-chill-3d2n/) - All 3 Gilis snorkeling + island cycling. Min. 2 pax.
- [LNC-06: Pink Beach Private Picnic (3D2N)](https://lomboknatureculture.com/produk/lnc-06-pink-beach-private-picnic-3d2n/) - Pink Beach + private seafood picnic + snorkeling. Min. 2 pax.
- [LNC-07: Lombok Surf Retreat (3D2N)](https://lomboknatureculture.com/produk/lnc-07-lombok-surf-retreat-3d2n/) - Private surf lessons at Selong Belanak. Min. 2 pax.
- [LNC-08: Pergasingan Hill Soft Trek (3D2N)](https://lomboknatureculture.com/produk/lnc-08-pergasingan-hill-soft-trek-3d2n/) - Luxury camping + Rinjani golden sunrise. Min. 2 pax.
- [LNC-09: Waterfall Chasers (3D2N)](https://lomboknatureculture.com/produk/lnc-09-waterfall-chasers-3d2n/) - 4 spectacular waterfalls in 2 days. Min. 2 pax.
- [LNC-10: Wellness Rejuvenation (4D3N)](https://lomboknatureculture.com/produk/lnc-10-wellness-rejuvenation-4d3n/) - Yoga + Sasak spa + forest meditation + Jamu workshop. Min. 2 pax.
- [LNC-HM0: Honeymoon Intimate (5D4N)](https://lomboknatureculture.com/produk/lnc-hm0-honeymoon-intimate-5d4n/) - Private pool villa + couple spa + candle light dinner. 2 pax.
- [LNC-12: Two Islands Journey (5D4N)](https://lomboknatureculture.com/produk/lnc-12-two-islands-journey-5d4n/) - Bali + Lombok combined. Ubud → Gili → Sasak culture. Min. 2 pax.
- [LNC-013: The Grand Lombok Odyssey (10D9N)](https://lomboknatureculture.com/produk/lnc-013-the-grand-lombok-odyssey-10d9n/) - Complete Lombok loop: highlands → Rinjani → Gili → surf → south. Min. 2 pax.
- [LNC-14: Slow Travel — Village & Sea (7D6N)](https://lomboknatureculture.com/produk/lnc-14-slow-travel-village-sea-7d6n/) - Village life + Gili Asahan + fishing BBQ dinner. Min. 2 pax.
- [LNC-15: Rinjani Summit & Island Recovery (8D7N)](https://lomboknatureculture.com/produk/lnc-15-rinjani-summit-island-recovery-8d7n/) - Rinjani summit 3,726m + 4-night luxury Gili recovery. Min. 2 pax.
- [LNC-16: The Two-Week Island Life (14D13N)](https://lomboknatureculture.com/produk/lnc-16-the-two-week-island-life-14d13n/) - Surf → Culture → Dive → Luxury Spa. 14 days workation-ready. Min. 2 pax.
- [LNC-01: Lombok Signature (3D2N)](https://lomboknatureculture.com/produk/lnc-01-lombok-signature-3d2n/) - Sasak culture + Secret Gilis snorkeling. Min. 2 pax.
